case_title: SERGEI K URYSON VS. KATSUTO OUNE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URYSON, SERGEI K IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OUNE, KATSUTO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF URYSON, SERGEI K AS TO DEFENDANT OUNE, KATSUTO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY 25, 2018. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY URYSON, SERGEI K AS TO DEFENDANT OUNE, KATSUTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2018 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF URYSON, SERGEI K ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-27-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OUNE, KATSUTO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY URYSON, SERGEI K OUNE, KATSUTO
